reason: Synced the lifecycle-chain planning spec with chain row fields, environmentContractRef/environmentSource export semantics, inheritance meaning boundaries, topology validation expectations, and the explicit Phase 1 planning-only runner boundary.
Documented that Skill Tests detail surfaces lifecycle chain ids from chat-exported source metadata while Phase 1 chain execution remains planning-only.
